Port City Talks

The opening of the end-of-term exhibition for the non-thesis Master’s Program themed “Port Cities,” designed under the auspices of Kadir Has University’s Faculty of Art and Design and led by Murat Tabanlıoğlu, took place at the Galata Greek School.

The exhibition titled “PORT CITY TALKS: LIVING BY THE WATER” features the students’ work and observations on different port cities over three semesters, along with the unique stories of cities that live by and are shaped by water.

For information about the non-thesis program that brings together urban research, design, and curation practices and features contributions from numerous academics and professionals abroad: https://portcities.khas.edu.tr/
